goal: Fix all horizontal scrolling, layout overflows, image sizing problems, and spacing issues that break the mobile viewport.
summary: Phase 3 complete. 14 files edited with critical layout fixes: overflow-x-hidden on App root, reduced border frame margins on mobile, scroll-to-top on route change, blur filter removed from AnimatePresence, text-outline sizes reduced across 5 pages with overflow-hidden containers, ParallaxImage mobile parallax reduced, CinematicImageReveal aspect ratio/mobile height fixed, ContentModal mobile width fixed, Journal w-max fixed, Photography aspect-[21/9] fixed, page padding/margins reduced, MagicalGateway min-height reduced. TypeScript: no errors.
